<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="cs"><head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Engine Test Suite</title>
  <style>
    /* ============================================================
       CUSTOM PROPERTIES + RESET
    ============================================================ */
    :root {
      --bg: #0a0a0c;
      --bg2: #111114;
      --bg3: #1a1a1f;
      --border: #2a2a30;
      --text: #e8e6df;
      --muted: #666660;
      --a: #e8ff6a;
      --b: #6affdb;
      --c: #ff6a9b;
      --d: #a06aff;

      --ease-spring: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1);
      --ease-sharp:  cubic-bezier(0.25, 0, 0, 1);
    }

    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; font-size: 16px; }
    body {
      background: var(--bg);
      color: var(--text);
      font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace;
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }

    /* ============================================================
       STICKY HEADER - position sticky + backdrop-filter
    ============================================================ */
    #header {
      position: sticky;
      top: 0;
      z-index: 999;
      height: 48px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 0 2rem;
      background: rgba(10,10,12,0.7);
      backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(180%);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(180%);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }

    #header .logo {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.2em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--a);
    }

    #fps-counter {
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
    }

    /* ============================================================
       LAYOUT - CSS Grid + subgrid
    ============================================================ */
    .page {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 200px 1fr;
      min-height: calc(100vh - 48px);
    }

    /* ============================================================
       SIDEBAR - position sticky inside grid
    ============================================================ */
    #sidebar {
      position: sticky;
      top: 48px;
      height: calc(100vh - 48px);
      overflow-y: auto;
      border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 1.5rem 0;
      scrollbar-width: thin;
      scrollbar-color: var(--border) transparent;
    }

    #sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
    #sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--border); }

    .nav-section {
      padding: 0 1rem 1rem;
    }

    .nav-section-title {
      font-size: 0.6rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.2em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--muted);
      padding: 0.5rem 0.5rem 0.5rem;
    }

    .nav-link {
      display: block;
      padding: 0.3rem 0.5rem;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      text-decoration: none;
      border-radius: 2px;
      transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
      white-space: nowrap;
      overflow: hidden;
      text-overflow: ellipsis;
    }

    .nav-link:hover {
      color: var(--text);
      background: var(--bg3);
    }

    .nav-link.active {
      color: var(--a);
    }

    /* ============================================================
       MAIN CONTENT
    ============================================================ */
    #main {
      padding: 2rem;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 3rem;
    }

    .test-section {
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      background: var(--bg2);
    }

    .test-header {
      padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      background: var(--bg3);
    }

    .test-title {
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.15em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--b);
    }

    .test-tag {
      font-size: 0.6rem;
      padding: 2px 6px;
      background: rgba(106,255,219,0.1);
      color: var(--b);
      border: 1px solid rgba(106,255,219,0.2);
    }

    .test-body {
      padding: 1.5rem;
    }

    /* ============================================================
       01 - BOX MODEL
    ============================================================ */
    .box-model-demo {
      display: flex;
      gap: 1.5rem;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      align-items: flex-end;
    }

    .box {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      transition: all 0.3s var(--ease-spring);
    }

    .box:hover { transform: scale(1.05); border-color: var(--a); color: var(--a); }

    .box-1 { width: 40px;  height: 40px; }
    .box-2 { width: 60px;  height: 60px; }
    .box-3 { width: 80px;  height: 80px; }
    .box-4 { width: 100px; height: 100px; }
    .box-5 { width: 120px; height: 120px; }
    .box-6 { width: 160px; height: 60px; }
    .box-7 { width: 60px;  height: 160px; }

    /* border-radius combinations */
    .box-r1 { border-radius: 50%; }
    .box-r2 { border-radius: 0 50% 50% 0; }
    .box-r3 { border-radius: 40% 60% 60% 40% / 40% 40% 60% 60%; }
    .box-r4 { border-radius: 4px; }
    .box-r5 { border-top-left-radius: 40px; border-bottom-right-radius: 40px; }

    /* ============================================================
       02 - FLEXBOX
    ============================================================ */
    .flex-demos {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 0.75rem;
    }

    .flex-row {
      display: flex;
      gap: 6px;
      background: var(--bg3);
      padding: 6px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      min-height: 48px;
    }

    .flex-item {
      background: rgba(232,255,106,0.08);
      border: 1px solid rgba(232,255,106,0.2);
      color: var(--a);
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 4px 8px;
      min-width: 32px;
    }

    /* flex-grow tests */
    .fg1 { flex-grow: 1; }
    .fg2 { flex-grow: 2; }
    .fg3 { flex-grow: 3; }

    /* align-self */
    .as-start    { align-self: flex-start; }
    .as-end      { align-self: flex-end; }
    .as-center   { align-self: center; }
    .as-stretch  { align-self: stretch; }
    .as-baseline { align-self: baseline; font-size: 0.9rem; }

    /* flex-wrap */
    .wrap-demo {
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .wrap-demo .flex-item {
      width: 60px;
    }

    /* ============================================================
       03 - GRID
    ============================================================ */
    .grid-demos {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 1rem;
    }

    .grid-label {
      font-size: 0.6rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      margin-bottom: 4px;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    }

    .g-item {
      background: rgba(160,106,255,0.08);
      border: 1px solid rgba(160,106,255,0.2);
      color: var(--d);
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      padding: 0.5rem;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }

    .grid-auto  { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(80px, 1fr)); gap: 6px; }
    .grid-fixed { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr 1fr; gap: 6px; }
    .grid-areas {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 100px 1fr 80px;
      grid-template-rows: 32px 80px 32px;
      grid-template-areas:
        "header header header"
        "sidebar content aside"
        "footer footer footer";
      gap: 4px;
    }

    .ga-header  { grid-area: header; }
    .ga-sidebar { grid-area: sidebar; }
    .ga-content { grid-area: content; }
    .ga-aside   { grid-area: aside; }
    .ga-footer  { grid-area: footer; }

    .grid-dense {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr);
      grid-auto-rows: 32px;
      grid-auto-flow: dense;
      gap: 4px;
    }

    .gd-wide  { grid-column: span 3; }
    .gd-tall  { grid-row: span 2; }
    .gd-big   { grid-column: span 2; grid-row: span 2; }

    /* ============================================================
       04 - TRANSFORMS
    ============================================================ */
    .transform-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(120px, 1fr));
      gap: 1rem;
    }

    .tf-box {
      height: 80px;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.6rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      transition: transform 0.4s var(--ease-spring), border-color 0.2s;
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    .tf-box:hover { border-color: var(--c); color: var(--c); }
    .tf-box:hover.rotate    { transform: rotate(45deg); }
    .tf-box:hover.skew      { transform: skewX(20deg) skewY(5deg); }
    .tf-box:hover.scale     { transform: scale(1.3); }
    .tf-box:hover.translate { transform: translateX(16px) translateY(-8px); }
    .tf-box:hover.matrix    { transform: matrix(1.1, 0.2, -0.2, 1.1, 5, 5); }
    .tf-box:hover.perspective-3d { transform: perspective(200px) rotateY(45deg); }
    .tf-box:hover.flip-x    { transform: scaleX(-1); }
    .tf-box:hover.flip-y    { transform: scaleY(-1); }

    /* ============================================================
       05 - ANIMATIONS & KEYFRAMES
    ============================================================ */
    @keyframes spin     { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
    @keyframes pulse    { 0%,100%{ opacity:1; transform:scale(1); } 50%{ opacity:0.5; transform:scale(0.9); } }
    @keyframes bounce   { 0%,100%{ transform:translateY(0); } 50%{ transform:translateY(-20px); } }
    @keyframes shake    { 0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)} 20%{transform:translateX(-6px)} 40%{transform:translateX(6px)} 60%{transform:translateX(-4px)} 80%{transform:translateX(4px)} }
    @keyframes blink    { 0%,100%{ opacity:1 } 50%{ opacity:0 } }
    @keyframes marquee  { from{ transform:translateX(100%) } to{ transform:translateX(-100%) } }
    @keyframes colorCycle {
      0%   { background: rgba(232,255,106,0.15); border-color: rgba(232,255,106,0.4); }
      33%  { background: rgba(106,255,219,0.15); border-color: rgba(106,255,219,0.4); }
      66%  { background: rgba(255,106,155,0.15); border-color: rgba(255,106,155,0.4); }
      100% { background: rgba(232,255,106,0.15); border-color: rgba(232,255,106,0.4); }
    }
    @keyframes drawLine { from{ stroke-dashoffset: 500 } to{ stroke-dashoffset: 0 } }
    @keyframes fadeSlide {
      from { opacity:0; transform: translateY(12px); }
      to   { opacity:1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    @keyframes ripple {
      0%   { transform: scale(0); opacity: 0.8; }
      100% { transform: scale(3); opacity: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes orbit {
      from { transform: rotate(0deg) translateX(40px) rotate(0deg); }
      to   { transform: rotate(360deg) translateX(40px) rotate(-360deg); }
    }
    @keyframes typewriter {
      from { width: 0; }
      to   { width: 100%; }
    }
    @keyframes gradient-shift {
      0%   { background-position: 0% 50%; }
      50%  { background-position: 100% 50%; }
      100% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
    }

    .anim-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(120px, 1fr));
      gap: 1rem;
    }

    .anim-box {
      height: 80px;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.6rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .a-spin     { animation: spin 2s linear infinite; }
    .a-pulse    { animation: pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .a-bounce   { animation: bounce 1s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .a-shake    { animation: shake 0.6s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .a-blink    { animation: blink 1s step-end infinite; }
    .a-color    { animation: colorCycle 3s linear infinite; }
    .a-orbit-wrap {
      position: relative;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    }
    .a-orbit-center {
      width: 12px; height: 12px;
      background: var(--d);
      border-radius: 50%;
    }
    .a-orbit-planet {
      position: absolute;
      width: 8px; height: 8px;
      background: var(--c);
      border-radius: 50%;
      animation: orbit 2s linear infinite;
    }

    /* animation-fill-mode, delay, iteration */
    .stagger-row {
      display: flex;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .stagger-item {
      width: 32px; height: 32px;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      animation: bounce 1s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    .stagger-item:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0s;    border-color: var(--a); }
    .stagger-item:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.1s;  border-color: var(--b); }
    .stagger-item:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.2s;  border-color: var(--c); }
    .stagger-item:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.3s;  border-color: var(--d); }
    .stagger-item:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.4s;  border-color: var(--a); }
    .stagger-item:nth-child(6) { animation-delay: 0.5s;  border-color: var(--b); }
    .stagger-item:nth-child(7) { animation-delay: 0.6s;  border-color: var(--c); }
    .stagger-item:nth-child(8) { animation-delay: 0.7s;  border-color: var(--d); }

    /* ============================================================
       06 - PSEUDO-ELEMENTS & SELECTORS
    ============================================================ */
    .pseudo-demo {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 1rem;
    }

    /* ::before / ::after content */
    .before-after-item {
      position: relative;
      padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-size: 0.8rem;
    }

    .before-after-item::before {
      content: '>>>';
      position: absolute;
      left: -28px;
      top: 50%;
      transform: translateY(-50%);
      color: var(--a);
      font-size: 0.7rem;
    }

    .before-after-item::after {
      content: attr(data-label);
      position: absolute;
      top: -10px;
      right: 8px;
      background: var(--bg);
      padding: 0 6px;
      font-size: 0.6rem;
      color: var(--b);
      border: 1px solid var(--b);
    }

    /* :nth-child, :not, :has */
    .nth-list {
      display: flex;
      gap: 6px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .nth-list span {
      width: 32px; height: 32px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
    }

    .nth-list span:nth-child(odd)      { border-color: var(--a); color: var(--a); }
    .nth-list span:nth-child(3n)       { background: rgba(106,255,219,0.1); }
    .nth-list span:nth-child(4n+1)     { transform: rotate(5deg); }
    .nth-list span:last-child          { border-color: var(--c); color: var(--c); }
    .nth-list span:not(:nth-child(5))  { opacity: 1; }
    .nth-list span:nth-child(5)        { opacity: 0.3; }
    .nth-list span:first-of-type       { border-width: 2px; }

    /* ::selection */
    .selection-demo {
      padding: 0.5rem;
      background: var(--bg3);
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      user-select: text;
      cursor: text;
    }

    .selection-demo::selection, .selection-demo *::selection {
      background: var(--a);
      color: #000;
    }

    /* :focus-visible */
    .focus-demo {
      display: flex;
      gap: 0.5rem;
    }

    .focus-btn {
      padding: 6px 12px;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--text);
      font-family: inherit;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      cursor: pointer;
      outline: none;
    }

    .focus-btn:focus-visible {
      outline: 2px solid var(--b);
      outline-offset: 2px;
    }

    .focus-btn:hover { border-color: var(--muted); }
    .focus-btn:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

    /* ============================================================
       07 - GRADIENTS
    ============================================================ */
    .gradient-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(140px, 1fr));
      gap: 0.75rem;
    }

    .grad-box {
      height: 80px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-end;
      padding: 0.5rem;
      font-size: 0.6rem;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
    }

    .g-linear-1  { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e8ff6a, #6affdb); }
    .g-linear-2  { background: linear-gradient(to right, #ff6a9b, #a06aff, #6affdb); }
    .g-linear-3  { background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, #0a0a0c); }
    .g-radial-1  { background: radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%, #e8ff6a, transparent); }
    .g-radial-2  { background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, #a06aff 0%, transparent 70%); }
    .g-conic-1   { background: conic-gradient(from 0deg, #e8ff6a, #6affdb, #ff6a9b, #a06aff, #e8ff6a); }
    .g-conic-2   { background: conic-gradient(var(--a) 90deg, var(--bg3) 90deg 180deg, var(--b) 180deg 270deg, var(--bg3) 270deg); }
    .g-multi     { background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(232,255,106,0.3) 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 20%, rgba(106,255,219,0.3), transparent 50%); background-color: var(--bg3); }
    .g-anim      { background: linear-gradient(270deg, var(--a), var(--b), var(--c), var(--d)); background-size: 400% 400%; animation: gradient-shift 4s ease infinite; }
    .g-hard-stop { background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--a) 33%, var(--b) 33% 66%, var(--c) 66%); }
    .g-repeating { background: repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, var(--bg3) 0px, var(--bg3) 8px, rgba(232,255,106,0.15) 8px, rgba(232,255,106,0.15) 16px); }
    .g-repeating-r { background: repeating-radial-gradient(circle, rgba(160,106,255,0.15) 0px, rgba(160,106,255,0.15) 4px, transparent 4px, transparent 12px); }

    /* ============================================================
       08 - FILTERS & EFFECTS
    ============================================================ */
    .filter-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(120px, 1fr));
      gap: 0.75rem;
    }

    .filter-box {
      height: 80px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--a), var(--b));
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.6rem;
      color: #000;
      transition: filter 0.3s;
    }

    .f-none       { filter: none; }
    .f-blur       { filter: blur(4px); }
    .f-brightness { filter: brightness(1.8); }
    .f-contrast   { filter: contrast(2); }
    .f-saturate   { filter: saturate(0); }
    .f-hue        { filter: hue-rotate(180deg); }
    .f-invert     { filter: invert(1); }
    .f-sepia      { filter: sepia(1); }
    .f-drop-shad  { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 12px var(--a)); }
    .f-multi      { filter: contrast(1.4) saturate(1.6) brightness(0.9); }

    /* mix-blend-mode */
    .blend-wrap {
      position: relative;
      height: 80px;
      background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--a), var(--b));
      overflow: hidden;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }

    .blend-overlay {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background: rgba(255,106,155,0.6);
    }

    .blend-multiply   { mix-blend-mode: multiply; }
    .blend-screen     { mix-blend-mode: screen; }
    .blend-overlay-bm { mix-blend-mode: overlay; }
    .blend-difference { mix-blend-mode: difference; }
    .blend-exclusion  { mix-blend-mode: exclusion; }

    .blend-text {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
      font-size: 0.6rem;
    }

    /* ============================================================
       09 - CLIP-PATH & MASKING
    ============================================================ */
    .clip-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(100px, 1fr));
      gap: 1rem;
    }

    .clip-box {
      height: 80px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--a), var(--c));
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.6rem;
      color: #000;
    }

    .cp-circle   { clip-path: circle(40%); }
    .cp-ellipse  { clip-path: ellipse(45% 35% at 50% 50%); }
    .cp-triangle { clip-path: polygon(50% 0%, 0% 100%, 100% 100%); }
    .cp-diamond  { clip-path: polygon(50% 0%, 100% 50%, 50% 100%, 0% 50%); }
    .cp-star     { clip-path: polygon(50% 0%,61% 35%,98% 35%,68% 57%,79% 91%,50% 70%,21% 91%,32% 57%,2% 35%,39% 35%); }
    .cp-arrow    { clip-path: polygon(0 25%,60% 25%,60% 0%,100% 50%,60% 100%,60% 75%,0 75%); }
    .cp-chevron  { clip-path: polygon(0% 0%,75% 0%,100% 50%,75% 100%,0% 100%,25% 50%); }
    .cp-custom   { clip-path: path('M50,0 C70,0 80,20 80,40 C80,60 70,80 50,80 C30,80 20,60 20,40 C20,20 30,0 50,0'); }

    /* ============================================================
       10 - CSS VARIABLES & CALC
    ============================================================ */
    .calc-demo {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 0.75rem;
    }

    .calc-bar {
      height: 28px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 0 8px;
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      color: #000;
      font-weight: 500;
    }

    /* calc() kombinace */
    .cb1 { width: calc(100% - 40px);         background: var(--a); }
    .cb2 { width: calc(50% + 20px);          background: var(--b); }
    .cb3 { width: calc(33.33% - 8px);        background: var(--c); }
    .cb4 { width: clamp(80px, 30%, 200px);   background: var(--d); color: #fff; }
    .cb5 { width: min(60%, 240px);           background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--a), var(--b)); }
    .cb6 { width: max(100px, 25%);           background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--c), var(--d)); color: #fff; }

    /* CSS custom properties math */
    :root {
      --cols: 4;
      --gap: 8px;
    }

    .var-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(var(--cols), 1fr);
      gap: var(--gap);
    }

    .var-item {
      height: calc(80px / var(--cols) * 2);
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.6rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    /* ============================================================
       11 - SCROLL & OVERFLOW
    ============================================================ */
    .overflow-demos {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 1rem;
    }

    .overflow-box {
      height: 120px;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      line-height: 1.6;
      padding: 0.5rem;
    }

    .ov-hidden   { overflow: hidden; }
    .ov-scroll   { overflow: scroll; scrollbar-width: thin; scrollbar-color: var(--a) var(--bg); }
    .ov-auto     { overflow: auto; }
    .ov-clip     { overflow: clip; }
    .ov-x-scroll { overflow-x: scroll; overflow-y: hidden; white-space: nowrap; scrollbar-width: thin; }

    /* scroll-snap */
    .snap-container {
      display: flex;
      overflow-x: scroll;
      scroll-snap-type: x mandatory;
      gap: 8px;
      padding-bottom: 4px;
      scrollbar-width: thin;
      scrollbar-color: var(--b) transparent;
    }

    .snap-item {
      flex: 0 0 160px;
      height: 80px;
      scroll-snap-align: start;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    /* ============================================================
       12 - TEXT & TYPOGRAPHY
    ============================================================ */
    .text-demos {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 0.75rem;
    }

    .td-row {
      padding: 0.5rem;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
    }

    /* writing-mode */
    .writing-wrap {
      display: flex;
      gap: 1rem;
      height: 120px;
    }

    .wr-horizontal { writing-mode: horizontal-tb; }
    .wr-vertical-rl { writing-mode: vertical-rl; font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--b); }
    .wr-vertical-lr { writing-mode: vertical-lr; font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--c); }

    /* text decoration */
    .tx-underline   { text-decoration: underline wavy var(--a) 2px; }
    .tx-overline    { text-decoration: overline double var(--b) 2px; }
    .tx-through     { text-decoration: line-through solid var(--c); }
    .tx-deco-skip   { text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; }

    /* font features */
    .tx-smallcaps   { font-variant-caps: small-caps; letter-spacing: 0.1em; }
    .tx-tabular     { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .tx-oldstyle    { font-variant-numeric: oldstyle-nums; }

    /* text-shadow */
    .tx-shadow-1 { text-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--a); color: var(--a); }
    .tx-shadow-2 { text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 var(--c), 4px 4px 0 var(--d); color: var(--text); }
    .tx-shadow-3 { text-shadow: 0 0 4px var(--b), 0 0 16px var(--b), 0 0 32px var(--b); color: var(--b); }

    /* column layout */
    .tx-columns {
      column-count: 3;
      column-gap: 1rem;
      column-rule: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      line-height: 1.6;
    }

    /* text overflow */
    .tx-ellipsis {
      white-space: nowrap;
      overflow: hidden;
      text-overflow: ellipsis;
    }

    /* word-break */
    .tx-break {
      word-break: break-all;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    /* ============================================================
       13 - POSITION
    ============================================================ */
    .position-demo {
      position: relative;
      height: 200px;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .pos-item {
      padding: 4px 8px;
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      border: 1px solid;
    }

    .pos-tl  { position: absolute; top: 8px;    left: 8px;    border-color: var(--a); color: var(--a); }
    .pos-tr  { position: absolute; top: 8px;    right: 8px;   border-color: var(--b); color: var(--b); }
    .pos-bl  { position: absolute; bottom: 8px; left: 8px;    border-color: var(--c); color: var(--c); }
    .pos-br  { position: absolute; bottom: 8px; right: 8px;   border-color: var(--d); color: var(--d); }
    .pos-ctr {
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%; left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      border-color: var(--text); color: var(--text);
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .pos-z1  { position: absolute; top: 40px; left: 40px; width: 80px; height: 80px; background: rgba(232,255,106,0.15); border: 1px solid var(--a); z-index: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.6rem; color: var(--a); }
    .pos-z2  { position: absolute; top: 60px; left: 60px; width: 80px; height: 80px; background: rgba(106,255,219,0.15); border: 1px solid var(--b); z-index: 2; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.6rem; color: var(--b); }
    .pos-z3  { position: absolute; top: 80px; left: 80px; width: 80px; height: 80px; background: rgba(255,106,155,0.15); border: 1px solid var(--c); z-index: 3; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.6rem; color: var(--c); }

    /* ============================================================
       14 - SVG (inline)
    ============================================================ */
    .svg-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(160px, 1fr));
      gap: 1rem;
    }

    .svg-box {
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 0.5rem;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }

    /* ============================================================
       15 - FORMS
    ============================================================ */
    .form-demo {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 1rem;
    }

    .fd-group {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 4px;
    }

    .fd-group.full { grid-column: 1 / -1; }

    .fd-label {
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    }

    .fd-input, .fd-select, .fd-textarea {
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--text);
      padding: 6px 10px;
      font-family: inherit;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      outline: none;
      transition: border-color 0.15s;
      width: 100%;
      appearance: none;
      -webkit-appearance: none;
    }

    .fd-input:focus, .fd-select:focus, .fd-textarea:focus {
      border-color: var(--b);
    }

    .fd-input:invalid      { border-color: var(--c); }
    .fd-input:valid        { border-color: rgba(82,255,160,0.4); }
    .fd-input:placeholder-shown { border-color: var(--border); }

    .fd-textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 80px; }

    /* custom range */
    .fd-range {
      -webkit-appearance: none;
      appearance: none;
      width: 100%;
      height: 4px;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border-radius: 0;
      outline: none;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
    }

    .fd-range::-webkit-slider-thumb {
      -webkit-appearance: none;
      width: 16px; height: 16px;
      background: var(--a);
      cursor: pointer;
      border-radius: 0;
    }

    .fd-range::-moz-range-thumb {
      width: 16px; height: 16px;
      background: var(--a);
      cursor: pointer;
      border-radius: 0;
      border: none;
    }

    /* custom checkbox */
    .fd-checkbox-wrap {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
    }

    .fd-checkbox {
      -webkit-appearance: none;
      appearance: none;
      width: 16px; height: 16px;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      cursor: pointer;
      position: relative;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .fd-checkbox:checked {
      background: var(--a);
      border-color: var(--a);
    }

    .fd-checkbox:checked::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      left: 4px; top: 1px;
      width: 5px; height: 9px;
      border: 2px solid #000;
      border-top: none;
      border-left: none;
      transform: rotate(45deg);
    }

    /* custom radio */
    .fd-radio {
      -webkit-appearance: none;
      appearance: none;
      width: 16px; height: 16px;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 50%;
      cursor: pointer;
      position: relative;
    }

    .fd-radio:checked {
      border-color: var(--b);
    }

    .fd-radio:checked::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 3px;
      background: var(--b);
      border-radius: 50%;
    }

    /* ============================================================
       16 - TABLE
    ============================================================ */
    .table-wrap { overflow-x: auto; }

    .styled-table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
    }

    .styled-table thead tr {
      background: var(--bg3);
    }

    .styled-table th {
      padding: 8px 12px;
      text-align: left;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-weight: normal;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }

    .styled-table td {
      padding: 8px 12px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }

    .styled-table tbody tr:hover {
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
    }

    /* nth-child striping */
    .styled-table tbody tr:nth-child(even) {
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.015);
    }

    .styled-table tbody tr:nth-child(even):hover {
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    }

    .cell-num { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; text-align: right; color: var(--b); }
    .cell-pos { color: var(--success, #52ffa0); }
    .cell-neg { color: var(--c); }

    /* ============================================================
       17 - SCROLL-DRIVEN ANIMATIONS (nativni CSS)
    ============================================================ */
    @supports (animation-timeline: scroll()) {
      @keyframes reveal-bar {
        from { opacity: 0; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left; }
        to   { opacity: 1; transform: scaleX(1); transform-origin: left; }
      }

      .scroll-reveal {
        animation: reveal-bar linear;
        animation-timeline: view();
        animation-range: entry 0% entry 100%;
      }
    }

    /* ============================================================
       18 - MISC OBSKURNICH CSS
    ============================================================ */

    /* contain */
    .contain-box {
      contain: layout style paint;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 0.75rem;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    /* isolation */
    .isolation-wrap {
      isolation: isolate;
      background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--a), var(--b));
      padding: 0.5rem;
    }

    /* aspect-ratio */
    .aspect-demos {
      display: flex;
      gap: 1rem;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .aspect-box {
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.6rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      width: 80px;
    }

    .ar-1x1  { aspect-ratio: 1 / 1; }
    .ar-16x9 { aspect-ratio: 16 / 9; width: 120px; }
    .ar-4x3  { aspect-ratio: 4 / 3; }
    .ar-9x16 { aspect-ratio: 9 / 16; width: 40px; }
    .ar-gold { aspect-ratio: 1.618 / 1; width: 100px; }

    /* object-fit */
    .obj-fit-wrap {
      display: flex;
      gap: 1rem;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .obj-item {
      width: 100px;
      height: 80px;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      overflow: hidden;
      position: relative;
    }

    .obj-inner {
      width: 100%; height: 100%;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--a), var(--b), var(--c));
      object-fit: cover;
    }

    .obj-stretch .obj-inner { object-fit: fill; transform: scaleX(1.5) scaleY(0.6); }
    .obj-cover   .obj-inner { object-fit: cover; }
    .obj-contain .obj-inner { object-fit: contain; background-color: var(--bg3); }

    /* pointer-events */
    .ptr-none { pointer-events: none; opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

    /* user-select */
    .us-none   { user-select: none; }
    .us-all    { user-select: all; }
    .us-text   { user-select: text; }

    /* will-change */
    .will-change-gpu {
      will-change: transform;
      animation: spin 4s linear infinite;
    }

    /* shape-outside (ve floatu) */
    .float-shape-wrap { min-height: 120px; font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.6; }
    .float-circle {
      float: left;
      width: 80px;
      height: 80px;
      shape-outside: circle(50%);
      background: radial-gradient(circle, var(--a), var(--b));
      border-radius: 50%;
      margin-right: 1rem;
    }

    /* counter */
    .counter-list {
      counter-reset: my-counter;
      list-style: none;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 4px;
    }

    .counter-list li {
      counter-increment: my-counter;
      padding: 4px 8px;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .counter-list li::before {
      content: counter(my-counter, decimal-leading-zero) ' ';
      color: var(--a);
      font-weight: 700;
      margin-right: 8px;
    }

    /* env() */
    .env-box {
      padding-top: env(safe-area-inset-top, 0px);
      padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px);
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding-left: 0.75rem;
      padding-right: 0.75rem;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      min-height: 40px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
    }

    /* overscroll-behavior */
    .overscroll-box {
      height: 100px;
      overflow-y: scroll;
      overscroll-behavior-y: contain;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 8px;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      line-height: 2;
      scrollbar-width: thin;
    }

    /* accent-color */
    .accent-demo {
      accent-color: var(--a);
      display: flex;
      gap: 1rem;
      align-items: center;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    /* color-scheme */
    .color-scheme-demo {
      color-scheme: dark;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 0.5rem;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
    }

    /* ============================================================
       19 - CSS CUSTOM PROPERTIES ADVANCED
    ============================================================ */
    .token-demo {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(100px, 1fr));
      gap: 4px;
    }

    .tok {
      height: 40px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.55rem;
      color: #000;
    }

    /* ============================================================
       20 - JS INTERACTIVITY SECTION
    ============================================================ */
    #canvas-section canvas {
      display: block;
      width: 100%;
      height: 200px;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
    }

    .js-controls {
      display: flex;
      gap: 0.75rem;
      margin-top: 0.75rem;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .js-btn {
      padding: 6px 14px;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--text);
      font-family: inherit;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.15s;
    }

    .js-btn:hover { border-color: var(--a); color: var(--a); }
    .js-btn:active { transform: scale(0.97); }
    .js-btn.active { border-color: var(--b); color: var(--b); background: rgba(106,255,219,0.08); }

    .event-log {
      height: 120px;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      overflow-y: auto;
      padding: 8px;
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      line-height: 1.8;
      scrollbar-width: thin;
    }

    .log-entry { border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04); padding: 2px 0; }
    .log-ts    { color: var(--muted); margin-right: 8px; }
    .log-evt   { color: var(--b); }
    .log-val   { color: var(--a); }

    .drag-zone {
      height: 80px;
      border: 2px dashed var(--border);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      transition: border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
      cursor: grab;
    }

    .drag-zone.over {
      border-color: var(--a);
      background: rgba(232,255,106,0.05);
      color: var(--a);
    }

    .draggable {
      display: inline-block;
      padding: 6px 14px;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      cursor: grab;
      user-select: none;
    }

    .draggable:active { cursor: grabbing; opacity: 0.6; }

    /* ============================================================
       RESIZE OBSERVER DEMO
    ============================================================ */
    .resize-demo {
      resize: horizontal;
      overflow: hidden;
      min-width: 200px;
      max-width: 100%;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 1rem;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    #resize-info { color: var(--b); font-size: 0.7rem; margin-top: 4px; }

    /* ============================================================
       INTERSECTION OBSERVER
    ============================================================ */
    .io-row {
      display: flex;
      gap: 1rem;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .io-box {
      width: 100px;
      height: 60px;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      transition: border-color 0.3s, background 0.3s;
    }

    .io-box.visible {
      border-color: var(--a);
      background: rgba(232,255,106,0.05);
      color: var(--a);
    }

    /* ============================================================
       CANVAS
    ============================================================ */
    #main-canvas {
      width: 100%;
      height: 200px;
      display: block;
      cursor: crosshair;
    }

    /* ============================================================
       INPUT EVENTS
    ============================================================ */
    .input-events-demo {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 1rem;
    }

    .ied-box {
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 1rem;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      min-height: 80px;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 6px;
    }

    .ied-val { color: var(--a); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

    /* ============================================================
       MISC
    ============================================================ */
    .marquee-wrap {
      overflow: hidden;
      white-space: nowrap;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      background: var(--bg3);
      height: 36px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
    }

    .marquee-inner {
      display: inline-block;
      animation: marquee 12s linear infinite;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      padding-left: 100%;
    }

    .marquee-inner span { color: var(--a); margin: 0 16px; }

    .typewriter-line {
      overflow: hidden;
      white-space: nowrap;
      border-right: 2px solid var(--a);
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      color: var(--a);
      width: 0;
      animation: typewriter 3s steps(40) 0.5s forwards, blink 0.75s step-end infinite;
    }

    /* ============================================================
       MEDIA QUERIES
    ============================================================ */
    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      .page { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      #sidebar { display: none; }
      .form-demo { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .overflow-demos { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .input-events-demo { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    }

    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
      *, *::before, *::after {
        animation-duration: 0.01ms !important;
        transition-duration: 0.01ms !important;
      }
    }

    @media print {
      body { background: white; color: black; }
      #sidebar, #header, .anim-grid { display: none; }
    }

    /* container queries (pokud je podporovano) */
    .cq-container {
      container-type: inline-size;
      container-name: card-cq;
      background: var(--bg3);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 1rem;
      resize: horizontal;
      overflow: hidden;
      min-width: 200px;
      max-width: 100%;
    }

    @container card-cq (min-width: 400px) {
      .cq-inner {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
        gap: 0.5rem;
      }
    }

    .cq-item {
      background: var(--bg2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 0.5rem;
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    /* @layer */
    @layer base, components, utilities;

    @layer base {
      .layer-demo { color: var(--muted); }
    }

    @layer components {
      .layer-demo { font-weight: 500; }
    }

    @layer utilities {
      .layer-demo { font-size: 0.8rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

  <!-- HEADER -->

        <div class="test-header">

          <span class="test-tag">stroke-dashoffset / viewBox / foreignObject</span>
        </div>
        <div class="test-body">
          <div class="svg-grid">
            <!-- Animated stroke -->
            <div class="svg-box">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" width="100" height="100">
                <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="none" stroke="rgba(232,255,106,0.2)" stroke-width="4"></circle>
                <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="none" stroke="var(--a)" stroke-width="4" stroke-dasharray="251" stroke-dashoffset="251" stroke-linecap="round" transform="rotate(-90 50 50)">
                  <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="251" to="0" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"></animate>
                </circle>
                <text x="50" y="55" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--a)" font-size="12" font-family="monospace">75%</text>
              </svg>
            </div>

            <!-- Path morphing -->
            <div class="svg-box">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" width="100" height="100">
                <path fill="none" stroke="var(--b)" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round">
                  <animate attributeName="d" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite" values="
                    M10,50 C10,20 90,20 90,50;
                    M10,50 C10,80 90,80 90,50;
                    M10,50 C10,20 90,20 90,50"></animate>
                </path>

  <script>
    /* ============================================================
       FPS COUNTER
    ============================================================ */
    let lastTime = performance.now();
    let frames = 0;
    const fpsEl = document.getElementById('fps-counter');

    function measureFps(now) {
      frames++;
      if (now - lastTime >= 500) {
        const fps = Math.round(frames / ((now - lastTime) / 1000));
        fpsEl.textContent = 'FPS: ' + fps;
        fpsEl.style.color = fps >= 55 ? 'var(--b)' : fps >= 30 ? 'var(--a)' : 'var(--c)';
        frames = 0;
        lastTime = now;
      }
      requestAnimationFrame(measureFps);
    }
    requestAnimationFrame(measureFps);

    /* ============================================================
       SVG SINE WAVE
    ============================================================ */
    const wavePoly = document.getElementById('wave-poly');
    let waveT = 0;

    function animateWavePoly() {
      let pts = '';
      for (let x = 0; x <= 200; x += 4) {
        const y = 40 + Math.sin((x / 30) + waveT) * 20 + Math.sin((x / 15) + waveT * 0.7) * 8;
        pts += x + ',' + y.toFixed(1) + ' ';
      }
      wavePoly.setAttribute('points', pts);
      waveT += 0.04;
      requestAnimationFrame(animateWavePoly);
    }
    animateWavePoly();

    /* ============================================================
       CANVAS
    ============================================================ */
    const canvas = document.getElementById('main-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    let canvasMode = 'draw';
    let isDrawing = false;
    let lastX = 0, lastY = 0;
    let particles = [];
    let wavePhase = 0;
    let animId = null;

    function resizeCanvas() {
      const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
      canvas.width  = rect.width;
      canvas.height = rect.height;
    }
    resizeCanvas();
    window.addEventListener('resize', resizeCanvas);

    function setMode(m) {
      canvasMode = m;
      document.querySelectorAll('.js-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
      document.getElementById('btn-' + m)?.classList.add('active');
      if (animId) cancelAnimationFrame(animId);
      if (m === 'particles') startParticles();
      if (m === 'wave') startWave();
    }

    function clearCanvas() {
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
      particles = [];
    }

    /* -- draw mode -- */
    canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
      if (canvasMode !== 'draw') return;
      isDrawing = true;
      [lastX, lastY] = [e.offsetX, e.offsetY];
    });

    canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
      if (!isDrawing || canvasMode !== 'draw') return;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.strokeStyle = `hsl(${(e.offsetX / canvas.width) * 360}, 100%, 65%)`;
      ctx.lineWidth = 2;
      ctx.lineCap = 'round';
      ctx.moveTo(lastX, lastY);
      ctx.lineTo(e.offsetX, e.offsetY);
      ctx.stroke();
      [lastX, lastY] = [e.offsetX, e.offsetY];
    });

    canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => { isDrawing = false; });

    /* -- particles -- */
    function Particle() {
      this.x = Math.random() * canvas.width;
      this.y = Math.random() * canvas.height;
      this.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2;
      this.vy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2;
      this.life = 1;
      this.decay = 0.003 + Math.random() * 0.006;
      this.size = 1 + Math.random() * 3;
      const colors = ['#e8ff6a','#6affdb','#ff6a9b','#a06aff'];
      this.color = colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];
    }

    function startParticles() {
      for (let i = 0; i < 80; i++) particles.push(new Particle());
      loopParticles();
    }

    function loopParticles() {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10,10,12,0.15)';
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
      particles = particles.filter(p => p.life > 0);
      while (particles.length < 80) particles.push(new Particle());
      particles.forEach(p => {
        p.x += p.vx;
        p.y += p.vy;
        p.life -= p.decay;
        ctx.globalAlpha = p.life;
        ctx.fillStyle = p.color;
        ctx.fillRect(p.x - p.size / 2, p.y - p.size / 2, p.size, p.size);
      });
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1;

      /* connect nearby particles */
      for (let i = 0; i < particles.length; i++) {
        for (let j = i + 1; j < particles.length; j++) {
          const dx = particles[i].x - particles[j].x;
          const dy = particles[i].y - particles[j].y;
          const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
          if (dist < 80) {
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.strokeStyle = particles[i].color;
            ctx.globalAlpha = (1 - dist / 80) * 0.3;
            ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
            ctx.moveTo(particles[i].x, particles[i].y);
            ctx.lineTo(particles[j].x, particles[j].y);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
          }
        }
      }
      animId = requestAnimationFrame(loopParticles);
    }

    /* -- wave -- */
    function startWave() {
      loopWave();
    }

    function loopWave() {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10,10,12,0.25)';
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
      const colors = ['#e8ff6a','#6affdb','#ff6a9b'];
      colors.forEach((col, i) => {
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.strokeStyle = col;
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
        ctx.globalAlpha = 0.7;
        for (let x = 0; x <= canvas.width; x++) {
          const y = canvas.height / 2
            + Math.sin((x / 60) + wavePhase + i * 1.2) * 30
            + Math.sin((x / 30) + wavePhase * 1.5) * 15;
          x === 0 ? ctx.moveTo(x, y) : ctx.lineTo(x, y);
        }
        ctx.stroke();
      });
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
      wavePhase += 0.03;
      animId = requestAnimationFrame(loopWave);
    }

    /* ============================================================
       EVENT LOGGER
    ============================================================ */
    const logEl = document.getElementById('event-log');
    const mousePosEl = document.getElementById('mouse-pos');
    const keyValEl  = document.getElementById('key-val');

    function pad(n) { return String(n).padStart(2, '0'); }

    function logEvt(name, val) {
      const now = new Date();
      const ts = pad(now.getHours()) + ':' + pad(now.getMinutes()) + ':' + pad(now.getSeconds());
      const div = document.createElement('div');
      div.className = 'log-entry';
      div.innerHTML = '<span class="log-ts">' + ts + '</span>'
        + '<span class="log-evt">' + name + '</span>'
        + (val ? ' <span class="log-val">' + val + '</span>' : '');
      logEl.prepend(div);
      if (logEl.children.length > 50) logEl.lastChild.remove();
      if (name === 'mousemove') mousePosEl.textContent = val;
      if (name === 'keydown')   keyValEl.textContent   = val;
    }

    /* ============================================================
       INTERSECTION OBSERVER
    ============================================================ */
    const ioBoxes = document.querySelectorAll('.io-box');
    const io = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
      entries.forEach(e => {
        e.target.classList.toggle('visible', e.isIntersecting);
        if (e.isIntersecting) logEvt('IntersectionObserver', e.target.textContent.trim());
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.5 });
    ioBoxes.forEach(b => io.observe(b));

    /* ============================================================
       RESIZE OBSERVER
    ============================================================ */
    const resizeDemo = document.getElementById('resize-demo');
    const resizeInfo = document.getElementById('resize-info');
    const ro = new ResizeObserver(entries => {
      entries.forEach(e => {
        const w = Math.round(e.contentRect.width);
        resizeInfo.textContent = 'sirka: ' + w + ' px';
        logEvt('ResizeObserver', w + 'px');
      });
    });
    ro.observe(resizeDemo);

    /* ============================================================
       MUTATION OBSERVER
    ============================================================ */
    let mutCount = 0;
    const mutTarget = document.getElementById('mutation-target');
    const mutCountEl = document.getElementById('mutation-count');
    const mo = new MutationObserver(mutations => {
      mutCount += mutations.length;
      mutCountEl.textContent = mutCount;
      mutations.forEach(m => logEvt('MutationObserver', m.type + ' +' + m.addedNodes.length));
    });
    mo.observe(mutTarget, { childList: true, subtree: true, attributes: true });

    function mutateDemo() {
      const colors = ['var(--a)','var(--b)','var(--c)','var(--d)'];
      const el = document.createElement('div');
      el.style.cssText = 'padding:4px 8px; border:1px solid ' + colors[mutCount % 4] + '; color:' + colors[mutCount % 4] + '; font-size:0.65rem;';
      el.textContent = 'node #' + (mutTarget.children.length + 1);
      mutTarget.appendChild(el);
    }

    /* ============================================================
       DRAG & DROP
    ============================================================ */
    let dragVal = '';

    function dragStart(e) {
      dragVal = e.target.dataset.val;
      e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', dragVal);
      logEvt('dragstart', dragVal);
    }

    const dropZone = document.getElementById('drop-zone');

    function dropHere(e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      dropZone.classList.remove('over');
      const val = e.dataTransfer.getData('text/plain');
      dropZone.textContent = 'Dropnuto: ' + val;
      dropZone.style.color = 'var(--a)';
      dropZone.style.borderColor = 'var(--a)';
      logEvt('drop', val);
      setTimeout(() => {
        dropZone.textContent = 'Pustit sem';
        dropZone.style.color = '';
        dropZone.style.borderColor = '';
      }, 2000);
    }

    /* ============================================================
       SIDEBAR ACTIVE LINK (IntersectionObserver)
    ============================================================ */
    const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.test-section');
    const navLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.nav-link');

    const sectionObs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
      entries.forEach(e => {
        if (e.isIntersecting) {
          navLinks.forEach(a => a.classList.remove('active'));
          const link = document.querySelector('.nav-link[href="#' + e.target.id + '"]');
          if (link) link.classList.add('active');
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.3 });

    sections.forEach(s => sectionObs.observe(s));
  </script>


</body></html>
